sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1588" key="a)eiestw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀει-εστώ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1588.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eternal being</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
